_description: Aggressive cleanup. Kills any orphan node.exe or cmd.exe (the dominant offenders for Claude Code subprocess leaks) regardless of classification, plus all standard MCP/shim chains. Removes 'unknown' from the spare list -- if the classifier can't identify it AND its parent is dead AND it's older than min_age_seconds, it goes.
_when_to_use: Heavy multi-session users who've confirmed their custom tools are listed in spare_cmdline_patterns. Run cc-procs.ps1 first to see what would be hit before enabling.
_warning: Test with -DryRun first. spare_cmdline_patterns is your safety net here -- list every in-house tool you do NOT want killed.

custom_classifiers._comment: Optional: tag your in-house MCPs so they show up correctly in cc-procs.ps1 diagnostic output.
